_doc: Editor directives, anchored to .mob source line numbers. The .mob owns choreography; this file owns post-production (captions, zoom, speed, trim, per-tap highlight tweaks). Every directive accepts signed `startDelayMs` / `endDelayMs` ms offsets - use them to fine-tune timing without re-recording. Remove all `_doc` fields when you copy this template.

trim._doc: Optional. fromLine/toLine reference .mob action lines. Delays shift each endpoint by signed ms. Defaults to first action â†’ last action end + 600 ms.

captions._doc: CAPTIONS. Top-level array - preferred over the legacy `# Caption:` comments in .mob. Each entry takes either `toLine` (+ optional `endDelayMs`) OR `durationMs`. Captions may NOT overlap in time (single shared bottom strip).

highlights._doc: PER-TAP highlight tweaks. Positive `startDelayMs` pushes the ripple + walking-finger arrival deeper into a long tap whose visual response lands well after touch-down (e.g. iOS view-transition taps with 700 ms+ MobAI durationMs). Unlisted lines fire at the natural startedAtMs.

directives._doc: MULTI-ACTION ZOOM. `fromLine`/`toLine` holds at peak across multiple actions (no unzoom-rezoom dip between). Optional `pan: [{afterMs, x, y, ease?}]` waypoints fly the camera within the range - `afterMs` is absolute, relative to the post-delay segment start. `ease` âˆˆ linear|in|out|in_out (default in_out). Default center is canvas horizontal-center + vertical-clamped so the status bar stays visible; override with explicit `x` / `y` in canvas pixels.
SINGLE-ACTION ZOOM (legacy shape, still supported). `side` âˆˆ before|during|after. Use `windowMs` when `side: during` lands on a tap (zero-width span).

SPEED. Same anchor shape as zoom - `{line, side}` or `{fromLine, toLine}`. `factor` > 0, != 1. Every speed segment is explicit - there is no auto pass over `reason: technical` waits. Overlapping segments are a hard error.
